languages.text: Сквозь пелену зеленого сияния, я увидел, как {name} тяжело поднимается на ноги, нечеловеческим усилием воли заставляя себя сопротивляться давлению чудовищного звука. {mf|Его|Ее} пример отозвался в сердцах подданных, заставив их воспрянуть духом. Один за одним люди вставали вслед за сво{mf|им|ей} госпо{mf|дином|жой}, ведомые величайшим чувством человеческой души — верностью.

Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.
languages.original_text: Сквозь пелену зеленого сияния, я увидел, как {name} тяжело поднимается на ноги, нечеловеческим усилием воли заставляя себя сопротивляться давлению чудовищного звука. {mf|Его|Ее} пример отозвался в сердцах подданных, заставив их воспрянуть духом. Один за одним люди вставали вслед за сво{mf|им|ей} госпо{mf|дином|жой}, ведомые величайшим чувством человеческой души — верностью.

traits.locale_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to get on {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

languages.text: A través de una neblina verde, vi a {name} esforzarse por ponerse en pie, obligándose a sí mism{mf|o|a} a resistir la presión del abominable sonido con un esfuerzo de voluntad sobrehumano. Su ejemplo caló en sus súbditos, avivando sus espíritus. Uno tras otro, se levantaron para seguir a su am{mf|o|a}, guiados por el más sublime de los sentimientos humanos: la lealtad.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

traits.locale_text: A través de una neblina verde, vi a {name} esforzarse por ponerse en pie, obligándose a sí mism{mf|o|a} a resistir la presión del abominable sonido con un esfuerzo de voluntad sobrehumano. Su ejemplo caló en sus súbditos, avivando sus espíritus. Uno tras otro, se levantaron para seguir a su am{mf|o|a}, guiados por el más sublime de los sentimientos humanos: la lealtad.

languages.text: À travers une brume verte, j'ai vu {name} se relever péniblement en s'efforçant de résister à la pression de ce son ignoble par un effort de volonté surhumain,galvanisant ses sujets et leur redonnant courage. L'un après l'autre, ils se levèrent et suivirent leur {mf|maître|maîtresse}, poussés par le plus sublime des sentiments humains : la loyauté.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

traits.locale_text: À travers une brume verte, j'ai vu {name} se relever péniblement en s'efforçant de résister à la pression de ce son ignoble par un effort de volonté surhumain,galvanisant ses sujets et leur redonnant courage. L'un après l'autre, ils se levèrent et suivirent leur {mf|maître|maîtresse}, poussés par le plus sublime des sentiments humains : la loyauté.

languages.text: 透过幽绿的荧光迷雾，我看到{name}挣扎着站起身，以超人的意志，强行抵御那怪诞声浪的压迫。这般榜样振奋了其臣民的心灵，重燃了他们的斗志。他们一个接一个地站起来，追随主君脚步。驱动他们的，正是人类最崇高的情感——忠诚。
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

traits.locale_text: 透过幽绿的荧光迷雾，我看到{name}挣扎着站起身，以超人的意志，强行抵御那怪诞声浪的压迫。这般榜样振奋了其臣民的心灵，重燃了他们的斗志。他们一个接一个地站起来，追随主君脚步。驱动他们的，正是人类最崇高的情感——忠诚。

languages.text: Durch einen leuchtenden grünen Nebel sah ich, {name}, {mf|der|die} mühsam auf die Beine kam und dem Druck des monströsen Geräusches mit übermenschlicher Willenskraft widerstand. {mf|Sein|Ihr} Beispiel beflügelte die Herzen {mf|seiner|ihrer} Untertanen und stärkte ihren Kampfgeist. Einer nach dem anderen standen sie auf und folgten {mf|ihrem Meister|ihrer Meisterin}, getrieben vom edelsten aller Gefühle eines Menschen ... Loyalität.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

Einer nach dem anderen standen sie auf und folgten {mf|ihrem Meister|ihrer Meisterin}, getrieben vom edelsten aller Gefühle eines Menschen ... Loyalität.

languages.text: Parlayan yeşil bir pusun içinden {name}, insanüstü bir irade gücüyle ayağa kalkmaya ve canavarca sesin yarattığı baskıya direnmeye çalışıyordu. Onun bu örnek davranışı, tebaasının yüreklerini harekete geçirip ruhlarını canlandırdı. O en yüce insani duygu olan sadakatle hareket ederek birbiri ardına ayağa kalktılar ve efendilerini takip ettiler.
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.

languages.text: 緑色の光る霧の中、{name}は必死に足元に這い上がり、その巨大な音の圧力に抗うために、超人並の意志の力で自分を奮い立たせている。{name}の行動は、彼の部下たちの心を奮い立たせ、彼らの士気を高めた。彼らは次々と立ち上がり、その最も崇高な感情である忠誠心によって、{name}に従った。
languages.original_text: Through a glowing green haze, I saw {name} struggle to {mf|his|her} feet, forcing {mf|himself|herself} to resist the pressure of the monstrous sound with a superhuman effort of the will. {mf|His|Her} example stirred {mf|his|her} subjects' hearts and rallied their spirits. One after another, they got up and followed their {mf|master|mistress}, driven by that most sublime of human sentiments, loyalty.
